title: phyllanthus gardneri
intro: Phyllanthus gardneri, also known as the green chiretta or sabrang, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, Phyllanthus gardneri has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and providing relief from digestive issues. Phyllanthus gardneri is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional Ayurvedic formulations like churnas and kwathas.
